_comment: A plugin's bundled hooks must be ADVISORY (PostToolUse) — they run in a shared user session and must never DENY a tool call. gate-protect.py (the worker-write deny gate) is therefore NOT bundled here; it is consent-wired per worker worktree at runtime by kernel/wire.py (the dev-factory pattern), so it blocks only inside a dispatched worker, never the operator's own edits.
